output.compositionNotes: Overall composition matches Figma design with spec overrides correctly applied. The implementation shows: (1) large Anton heading 'Search Results' at top, (2) search bar on its own row with pill-shaped input + Search button, (3) filter-by dropdown and SHOW N PER PAGE on a separate row below search per spec override, (4) single-column result cards with post type pill, title, excerpt, and Learn More button, (5) centered pagination with gradient progress bar below. All five test variations render correctly with different configurations.

specOverridesVerified.override: Search bar on its own row
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Implementation screenshot shows search input and submit button on a dedicated row, separate from the filter controls below. Figma shows search + filter-by on same row, but spec override correctly applied.

specOverridesVerified.override: Filter by button filters by post type, below the search bar
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Filter-by Post Type dropdown appears on a second row below the search bar. Correctly filters by post type.

specOverridesVerified.override: Filters displayed on a new line, like the Archive block
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Filter row is on its own line below the search form, matching Archive block pattern.
Figma shows 'BREADCRUMBS > BREADCRUMBS' at top of each card. Implementation correctly omits breadcrumbs per spec override.

specOverridesVerified.override: Pill with post type follows page accent color
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Post type pills (e.g., 'POLICY') use accent color tokens (bg-accent-lighter, border-accent-light) which renders as a yellow-green tint matching the page accent. Figma shows teal (#b2eae7/#00b8b0) which is the default accent -- implementation uses dynamic accent tokens which is correct per spec.

specOverridesVerified.override: Title displayed below post type (not in Figma)
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Card titles (e.g., 'Campus Safety and Emergency Procedures') appear below the post type pill. This is not in the Figma design but correctly added per spec override.
Excerpt text visible below titles on cards that have excerpts.
'LEARN MORE' with arrow icon visible at bottom of each card.
Cards display in single-column layout (grid-cols-1), one card per row across all breakpoints.

specOverridesVerified.override: Learn more or pagination should be center aligned
specOverridesVerified.evidence: Pagination is center-aligned (flex justify-center). Load More button also center-aligned in variation 2.

specOverridesVerified.override: Show N per page at the top, on the same line as the filter
specOverridesVerified.evidence: 'SHOW 9 PER PAGE' appears on the filter row, right-aligned (ml-auto), on the same line as the Filter by Post Type dropdown. Figma shows this at the bottom with pagination, but spec override correctly moves it to the top.

findings.description: Search input takes full available width with Search button to the right. This differs from Figma where search + filter-by share the same row, but correctly follows the spec override to put the search bar on its own row.
Heading 'Search Results' renders in Anton Regular at approximately 64px, matching Figma's text-header-1 specification. Visual weight and proportions match the Figma reference.
Gap between heading and search/filter area appears to be approximately 64px (gap-gap-7), matching Figma's margin-5 (64px) measurement.
Cards show rounded-3xl (24px) border radius. Figma specifies 25px. Difference of 1px is well within tolerance.
Card padding appears to be 24px (p-6) and internal gap 24px (gap-6), matching Figma's margin-2 (24px) and gap-4 (24px).

Pill uses accent color tokens (yellow-green tint on current page). Figma shows teal (#b2eae7/#00b8b0) which is the default accent. The implementation correctly uses dynamic accent tokens per spec override, so the rendered color depends on the page's accent setting.
Excerpt renders in Roboto Medium 16px with relaxed line-height (~1.5), matching Figma's Body/Body-Medium style specification.
'LEARN MORE' text renders uppercase with arrow icon, matching Figma's Others/Button style (Roboto Medium, 16px, uppercase). Arrow icon is visible at approximately 20x16px.

Pagination renders centered with page numbers (1, 2, NEXT >). Below the numbers is a gradient progress bar transitioning from green to blue, matching Figma's neon-green (#b8ff34) to blue (#47cbf2) gradient specification. The progress bar track is charcoal at 50% opacity with 10px border-radius and 4px height.
Gap between result cards appears to be approximately 32px (gap-8), matching Figma's margin-3 (32px) specification.

At 768px, the layout maintains its structure well. Search input and button share a row. Filter dropdown and per-page selector share the second row. Cards remain single-column. All elements are properly spaced.
At 1024px, layout is consistent with desktop. All elements proportionally sized. Search bar, filter row, cards, and pagination all render correctly.

At 375px, all elements stack vertically as expected. Search input takes full width with Search button below. Filter-by dropdown takes full width. SHOW/PER PAGE selector stacks below filter. Cards remain full-width single-column. Heading wraps to two lines ('Search Results'). All text remains readable.
Heading scales down appropriately on mobile (text-header-1 responsive sizing). Visual hierarchy is maintained.

crossBrowserConsistency.notes: All three browsers render consistently at all four breakpoints (375, 768, 1024, 1440). No visible cross-browser differences in layout, typography, spacing, or card rendering.

variationsVerified.name: Default Search - Pagination Mode
variationsVerified.notes: Full layout with heading, search bar, filter row with 'Filter by Post Type' dropdown and 'SHOW 9 PER PAGE', result cards with post type pills/titles/excerpts/Learn More, and centered pagination with progress bar.

variationsVerified.name: Load More Mode
variationsVerified.notes: Same layout but with 'Load More' button (btn-secondary) centered below results instead of numbered pagination. Custom placeholder 'Search our site' renders correctly.

variationsVerified.name: Minimal - No Filters, No Per Page
variationsVerified.notes: Heading 'Search', search bar only (no filter row, no per-page selector). Results display with pagination. Conditional rendering works correctly.

variationsVerified.name: Custom Heading and Placeholder
variationsVerified.notes: Custom heading 'Find What You're Looking For' renders correctly in Anton. Custom placeholder 'Type keywords here...' visible in search input. postsPerPage=6 shows 6 results per page with correct pagination.

variationsVerified.name: Filters Only - No Per Page
variationsVerified.notes: Filter-by dropdown visible but no per-page selector. Load More mode. Independent toggle behavior verified.

positiveFindings: Heading typography (Anton Regular 64px) matches Figma exactly
Card structure (border, rounded corners, padding, gap) closely matches Figma measurements
Post type pills use dynamic accent tokens per spec override, enabling per-page color customization
Search bar correctly placed on its own row per spec override (differs from Figma intentionally)
Show N Per Page correctly placed on filter row per spec override (Figma places it at bottom)
No breadcrumbs on cards per spec override (Figma shows breadcrumbs)
Title added below post type pill per spec override (not in Figma)
Pagination with gradient progress bar (neon-green to blue) matches Figma specification
Pagination and Load More button are center-aligned per spec override
All five variations render correctly with different attribute combinations
Responsive behavior is well-implemented across all breakpoints
Cross-browser consistency is excellent (chromium, firefox, webkit)
Cards display in single-column layout per spec override
Search input has white background contrasting against the off-white page background per Figma
Light mode block correctly uses page background (not dark mode like Archive)
Filter row search input has pill shape (rounded-full) matching Figma's 119px radius
